headline: FedEx CFO to leave in June
summary: FedEx’s Claude Russ will step in as interim CFO while the company completes its spinoff of FedEx Freight, which is poised for strong revenue and profit growth, leaders said.

headline: FedEx CFO departure raises timing questions but UBS says strategy intact
summary: FedEx Corp (NYSE:FDX, XETRA:FDX) is facing an “optically tough” leadership transition as its chief financial officer steps down ahead of a planned freight spin-off, but UBS said the move is consistent with the company’s financial strategy and maintained a positive view on the stock.
